creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
On 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n247138-903526542ac: Thu Jun  3 11:32:52 UTC 2021 

I see that net/libpcap fails to build due to a trivial warning : 

jar# uname -apKU 
FreeBSD jar 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #0 main-n247138-903526542ac: Thu Jun  3 11:32:52 UTC 2021     root@releng1.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC  amd64 amd64 1400018 1400018
jar#

warning: POSIX Yacc does not support %define [
jar# 



The silly trick is to use GNU bison here with : 

# setenv YACC '/usr/local/bin/bison'


Then make clean and make 

jar# make
